commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `maybeRepairLegacyFlatAuthProfileStores` to merge legacy flat auth profiles into the existing SQLite auth store, verify imported profile persistence before deleting JSON, and add a regression test.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +47. Total +68 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main saves only the legacy flat store into SQLite, and the PR body provides before/after live output using the real repair function and on-disk SQLite readback; I did not rerun tests because this review is read-only.
